extra.reason: T1 done: formula-drain.formula.toml created in dev-flow/.beads/formulas/; bd formula show + bd mol pour --dry-run both verify; jj describe applied. Lesson filed on epic re: required .formula.toml suffix (not .toml as spec/plan said).

T7 done: resume-mode section added with metadata recovery (drain_mode/drain_scope/drain_started_at via jq), validation guard for missing metadata, case-statement sentinel recomposition with unknown-mode fallback. Self-reviewed.

T10 done: pointer paragraphs added to subagent-driven-development (after Continuous execution) and executing-plans (after Note block). rumdl clean. Done inline (proportionate to 4-line edits).
